name: MOKLAV GLOBAL (OPC) PRIVATE LIMITED
notes:
​AS154448 (Moklav Global) is a technology-focused ISP and infrastructure provider. We maintain an open peering policy and are committed to improving global routing efficiency and latency.

​Technical Configuration:
​Peering Policy: Open
​Traffic Profile: Mostly Inbound

​Geofeed: https://moklav.com/geofeed.csv

​We announce /24 IPv4 and /40 IPv6 prefixes. All route objects and RPKI ROAs are valid. Our infrastructure is optimized for high-performance 

networking and low-latency delivery. For peering requests or NOC issues, please contact noc@moklav.com.
